prompt: By default the veo-3.1-fast model with a landscape 8-second clip will be used.
Highest-quality Veo 3.1, two variations. For all parameters see https://useapi.net/docs/api-google-flow-v1/post-google-flow-videos
Image-to-video with a start frame (startImage) and an end frame (endImage). Veo only — omni-flash supports a start frame only.
Gemini Omni Flash is audio-native and supports 10-second clips. Other models (veo-3.1-lite, veo-3.1-lite-low-priority, …) are selectable via the model field — see the POST /videos docs.
